name: Currant-Bran Muffies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cereal, flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and sugar in a 1-quart mixing bowl. Mix well.
2. Add buttermilk, egg whites, safflower oil, and molasses. Stir to combine (ignore any small lumps).
3. Stir in currants. Chill, covered airtight, at least 4 hours to thicken.
4. Drop about 2 tablespoons thickened batter, 2 inches apart, onto greased baking sheets. Sprinkle with more cereal if desired.
5. Bake in the center of a 425-degree oven until tops have taken a slight color and edges are very lightly browned, approximately 8-9 minutes, rotating pans if browning is irregular.
6. Do not overbake. Cool on racks.
Makes 16 (3-inch) muffins.
